School orientation recommender

Orien Tech

A premium academic guidance experience that turns student profiles, marks, and interests into confident next-step recommendations.

6-step guided intake
AI-ready adaptive questions
Mobile-first responsive flow
Experience design Premium SaaS UI

The new layout keeps the orientation flow calm, legible, and responsive across screen sizes.

Orientation engine ready for a high-trust student profile.

Astro + React cockpit

High-fidelity intake for better academic decisions.

Capture the student story, weigh academic signals, and surface school options through a polished product flow.

Accessible Responsive Premium UI
Orientation confidenceStructured, not generic

Balanced inputs across profile, diagnostics, marks, and certificates.

Decision signalMore than marks

Academic fit is ranked with learning style and evidence of engagement.

UX patternCalm guided flow

Clear hierarchy, generous spacing, and a step rail for fast scanning.

Step 01

Student Profile

Start with the basics so Orien Tech can adapt the diagnostic to the student’s school stage.

Current school stage

Step 02

Cognitive Identity Diagnostic

Map how the student processes information before matching school options.

Two-axis logic

Beyond grades

Orien Tech combines marks with cognitive identity: data vs people, and ideas vs concrete execution.

IdeasThingsPeopleData
Visionary Creative
Analytical Explorer
Human Operator
Practical Realist
I enjoy solving complex problems and finding patterns.
I learn well by discussing ideas and helping others.
I like creating designs, stories, products, or media.
I prefer hands-on projects over only theoretical lessons.
I stay focused when a subject becomes difficult.
I feel comfortable organizing people or presenting ideas.

Step 03

Subject Marks

Add recent marks to identify academic strengths.

Step 04

Certificates

Optional, but useful when the student has proof of interests outside ordinary marks.

Step 05

Adaptive AI Questions

Answer a few focused questions based on the profile.

Answer the earlier steps to unlock AI questions.The prompts will adapt to marks, identity signals, and the student stage.

Step 06

Recommended Options

Orien Tech ranks the school options using academic fit, learning style, interests, and profile evidence.

Ready when your profile is complete.Use Generate options to see the best-fit academic choices.
